captions: select the item below compass the compass
turn on item at the bottom right corner
turn on the icon to the right of i ve learned
open the icon next to the i ve learned icon

[{"text": "Compass

The compass uses hardware in your device to find direction. 
Magnetic north matches a physical compass, while true north adjusts according to a recent location from the GPS. 
The blue line is a target direction that you can set with your finger or via a GOTO waypoint. 
On bearing compass, you line up the green and blue line to set walking direction.
On orienteering compass, you line up the small red arrow and green arrow with north/south.
The compass may be calibrated by waving your device in a figure eight pattern. Yes, really.
